step_rationale: Catalyzes kynurenine production in macrophages; regulates tryptophan metabolism in CVD.
mechanism: IDO1 drives tryptophan catabolism to kynurenine in thrombi macrophages, amplifying plaque inflammation and destabilization.

references.title: Untargeted metabolomics identified kynurenine as a predictive prognostic biomarker in acute myocardial infarction.
Tryptophan: From Diet to Cardiovascular Diseases.
